parameters.description: Send notifications to your own WxPusher destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise wxpusher:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native WxPusher {appToken, content, uids} payload delivered straight to wxpusher.zjianzhan.cn.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"appToken":"${ customer_secrets.WXPUSHER_TOKEN }","contentType":1,"uids":["${ customer_secrets.WXPUSHER_TARGETS }"],"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to WxPusher send/message (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment WxPusher destinations, direct

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's WxPusher targets

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's WxPusher token
